name: 16p13_11_recurrent_CNV
description: 16p13.11 recurrent ~1.5 Mb microdeletion/microduplication region, flanked by paralogous SD blocks at >95% identity. Susceptibility CNV for epilepsy, intellectual disability, schizophrenia, and autism.

architecture.internal_structure: Three SD blocks (LCR16a/LCR16b) mediating ~1.5 Mb and ~800 kb recurrent CNVs; core contains MYH11, NDE1, ABCC1, ABCC6, KIAA0430.
